rationale: The citing paper’s constructs and mechanism (logo asymmetry, brand personality excitement, arousal, logo–brand congruence, brand equity) do not overlap with the cited paper’s focus on coupon-window wording, construal level, and promotion redemption. In the provided evidence, the match is only a single DOI reference with no contextual citation text, and nothing in the citing note suggests this specific promotion-framing study is a method/theory cornerstone for the logo-design results.
